title: Proclamation No. 1353, s. 1974
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1353

RESERVING FOR BUILDING SITE AND OTHER PURPOSES OF THE NUEVA VIZCAYA STATE INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYOMBONG, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VISCAYA, ISLAND OF LUZON

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Natural Resources, and by virtue of the authority vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby reserve for building site and other purposes of the Nueva Vizcaya State Institute of Technology, subject to private rights, if any there be, a certain parcel of land of the public domain situated in the Municipality of Bayombong, Province of Nueva Vizcaya, Island of Luzon, which parcel of land is more particularly described as follows:

“A parcel of land (Lot 2, being a portion of Lots 2879 and 2884 of the Cadastral Survey of Bayombong, L.R.C. G.L.R.C. Cad. Rec. No.__), situated in the Municipality of Bayombong, Province of Nueva Vizcaya, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the N., points 8 to 9 by Lot 1532; points 9 to 10 by Lot 2818; points 10 to 11 by Lot 2917; points 11 to 12 by Lot 2916; points 12 to 14 by Lot 2907; points 14 to 17 by Lot 1497; points 17 to 20 by Lot 1 (port. of Lots 2879 and 2884); points 20 to 22 by Lot 1313; points 22 to 24 by Lot 1312; points 24 to 25 by Lot 1311; points 25 to 26 by Lot 2575; points 26 to 27 by Lot 2576; points 27 to 28 by Lot 2577; points 28 to 29 by Lot 2578; points 29 to 30 by Lot 2579; points 30 to 31 by Lot 2580; points 31 to 32 by Lot 2581; points 32 to 33 by Lot 2582; points 33 to 34 by Lot 2583; on the SB., points 34 to 43 by Culucul Creek 10.00 m. wide; points 43 to 45 by Lot 2996; on the S., points 45 to 47 byLot 2997; points 47 to 48 by Lot 2998; on the S., points 48 to 49 by Lot 2589; points 49 to 50 by Lot 2866; points 50 to 51 by Lot 2865; points 51 to 1 by Lot 2895; on the SW., points 1 to 2 by Lot 1641; points 2 to 5 by Lot 3360; and on the NW., points 5 to 7 by Lot 1534; points 7 to 8 by Lot 1533 all of Bayombong Cadastre. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being S. 22 deg. 23’E., 498.85 m. from B.L.L.M. No. 3, Bayombong Cadastre,

thence N. 51 deg. 10’W.,  186.73 m. to point 2; thence N. 38 deg. 26’W.,  193.81 m. to point 3; thence N. 1 deg. 39’W., 54.00 m. to point 4; thence N. 4 deg. 56’W.,  80.37 m. to point 5; thence N. 28 deg. 48’E.,  104.90 m. to point 6; thence N. 38 deg. 40’E.,  98.91 m. to point 7; thence N. 43 deg. 15’E.,  198.56 m. to point 8; thence N. 80 deg. 45’E.,  241.96 m. to point 9; thence N. 75 deg. 06’E.,  53.22 m. to point 10; thence N. 77 deg. 58’E.,  55.40 m. to point 11; thence N. 66 deg. 21 E.,  45.47 m. to point 12; thence N. 76 deg. 32’E.,  34.08 m. to point 13; thence N. 80 deg. 06’E.,  124.02 m. to point 14; thence S. 9 deg. 24’E.,  51.28 m. to point 15; thence S. 13 deg. 14’E.,  89.02 m. to point 16; thence N. 65 deg. 13’E.,  95.08 m. to point 17; thence S. 6 deg. 00’W.,  190.00 m. to point 18; thence N. 38 deg. 52’E.,  386.50 m. to point 19; thence N. 2 deg. 12’E.,  348.00 m. to point 20; thence S. 74 deg. 21’E.,  83.11 m. to point 21; thence N. 88 deg. 29’E.,  68.82 m. to point 22; thence S. 80 deg. 50’W.,  119.57 m. to point 23; thence N. 79 deg. 58’E.,  60.85 m. to point 24; thence N. 78 deg. 08’E.,  60.03 m. to point 25; thence S. 69 deg. 00’E.,  200.36 m. to point 26; thence S. 68 deg. 01’E.,  99.56 m. to point 27; thence S. 68 deg. 24’E.,  50.62 m. to point 28; thence S. 68 deg. 00’E.,  37.76 m. to point 29; thence S. 68 deg. 13’E.,  52.66 m. to point 30; thence S. 68 deg. 07’E.,  56.52 m. to point 31; thence S. 68 deg. 32’E.,  42.99 m. to point 32; thence S. 68 deg. 01’E.,  40.04 m. to point 33; thence S. 65 deg. 21’E.,  127.26 m. to point 34; thence S. 21 deg. 05’W.,  46.59 m. to point 35; thence S. 26 deg. 27’W.,  21.34 m. to point 36; thence S. 4 deg. 27’E.,  107.29 m. to point 37; thence S. 29 deg. 39’W.,  21.63 m. to point 38; thence S. 49 deg. 53’W.,  65.07 m. to point 39; thence S. 47 deg. 06’W.,  274.36 m. to point 40; thence S. 17 deg. 36’W.,  73.14 m. to point 41; thence S. 22 deg. 38’W.,  40.72 m. to point 42; thence S. 64 deg. 40’W.,  25.00 m. to point 43; thence N. 54 deg. 03’W.,  225.85 m. to point 44; thence S. 36 deg. 41’W.,  120.88 m. to point 45; thence S. 36 deg. 58’W.,  184.11 m. to point 46; thence S. 47 deg. 23’E.,  94.95 m. to point 47; thence S. 89 deg. 22’W.,  337.95 m. to point 48; thence S. 85 deg. 40’W., 112.62 m. to point 49; thence S. 86 deg. 08’W.,  104.42 m. to point 50; thence N. 35 deg. 11’W.,  135.96 m. to point 51; thence N. 49 deg. 45’W.,   392.87 m. to point 52; thence S. 26 deg. 43’W.,   543.68 m. to point of beginning; containing an area of ONE MILLION FOUR HUNDRED SIXTY THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED NINETY-SEVEN (1,460,597) SQUARE METERS, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: points 18 and 19, by P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons. 15 x 60 cm. and the rest by Old Points. Bearings true; declination 0 deg. 45’E., date of the original survey October 1924 to August 1926.”

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 2nd day of December, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and seventy-four.

(SGD.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President Republic of the Philippines

By the Executive Secretary:

(SGD.) RONALDO B. ZAMORA Assistant Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
